news.headline: Federal Reserve's key inflation measure slows down for the first time in 4 months. PCE index at 2.5% in Jan 2025, in line with forecasts. Core PCE at 2.6%.
news.summary: Update: The Federal Reserve's primary inflation gauge met expectations on Friday, as headline PCE inflation experienced its first slowdown in four months. In January 2025, the Personal Consumption Expenditures price index rose by 2.5% compared to the previous year, decelerating from December's 2.6%. This figure aligned with economists' predictions. The core PCE, excluding volatile food and energy prices, saw a 2.6% increase year-over-year. For more information, including the monthly PCE index advancement, visit a reliable news source.

news.headline: Investors anxious over PCE data indicating consumer-spending decline, impacting market trends.
IT sector & industry performance report on Bloomberg shows a 5% increase in revenue for Q3, surpassing expectations.
Cybersecurity summit in D.C. on MAR 10-12 will feature leaders from different sectors discussing ways to protect against cyberattacks.
news.summary: From March 10-12, the Billington State & Local CyberSecurity Summit will bring together government officials at the federal, state, and city levels to address cybersecurity challenges. The event will focus on safeguarding the nation from cyberattacks and promoting collaboration among key stakeholders. Attendees will include leaders from various sectors, with a specific emphasis on the importance of 5G technology in enhancing security measures.

news.headline: ORYZON reported results of voting at its Extraordinary General Shareholders' Meeting with 24,030,812 shares present.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Madrid, Spain, Oryzon Genomics S.A. disclosed the outcome of the voting at the Extraordinary General Shareholders' Meeting. Out of the total of 24,030,812 ordinary shares of the company (equivalent to 36.5312% of the share capital) present at the meeting in person or via proxy, various decisions were made. Oryzon Genomics S.A. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm concentrating on epigenetics to create treatments for illnesses with notable unmet medical requirements.

news.headline: FuboTV's Q4 revenue grew 8.1% to $443.277 million, missing estimates. Subscribers increased by 6.2% to 1.64 million.
news.summary: FuboTV Inc (NYSE: FUBO) announced its fourth-quarter 2024 earnings on Friday. The sports-centric live TV streaming platform saw revenue increase by 8.1% year over year, reaching $443.277 million. This was slightly below the analyst consensus of $445.798 million. The adjusted EPS loss was 2 cents, surpassing the analyst estimate of an 18 cents loss. The company's adjusted EBITDA margin loss was (2.0)% compared to (12.2)% year over year. In North America, streaming revenue grew by 8% year over year to $433.8 million. The paid subscribers also increased by 6.2% year over year, totaling 1.64 million. The average revenue per user (ARPU) rose by 1.4% year over year to $87.90.For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Duolingo reports Q4 results: Revenue up 39% to $209.6M, paid subscribers up 43% to 9.5M, subscriptions bookings up 50%.
news.summary: Duolingo, Inc. (NASDAQ:DUOL) saw a decrease in premarket trading following the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company experienced a 39% year-over-year revenue growth, reaching $209.6 million, surpassing the expected $205.4 million, mainly driven by a 48% increase in subscription revenue. Overall bookings climbed by 42% to $271.6 million, with subscription bookings up by 50% to $236.5 million during the quarter. The number of paid subscribers grew to 9.5 million by the end of the quarter, marking a 43% increase from the previous year. The rise in subscription bookings and revenue was supported by a higher average number of subscribers.

news.headline: CoStar Group acquires Matterport, a leader in 3D digital twin tech, to boost AI-driven innovation in real estate.
news.summary: Today, CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent online real estate marketplace, information, and analytics provider, has finalized its acquisition of Matterport, Inc. (NASDAQ: MTTR), a notable leader in 3D digital twin technology. This merger of industry leaders aims to boost the implementation of AI-powered digital twin technology in the global real estate sector.

news.headline: Surge Copper grants 4,583,334 RSUs to employees and executives, and 3,431,372 DSUs to directors. Equity incentive awards.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Vancouver-based Surge Copper Corp. revealed the allocation of equity-based incentive awards through its Share Compensation Plan. The company granted a total of 4,583,334 restricted share units (RSUs) to employees and executives, along with 3,431,372 deferred share units (DSUs) to non-executive directors. These awards were determined based on the 5-day volume weighted average price on the TSX Venture Exchange. Surge Copper Corp. is listed as TSXV: SURG, OTCQB: SRGXF, and Frankfurt: G6D2.

news.headline: Ethereum Foundation establishes "Silviculture Society" to safeguard core values of blockchain.
news.summary: A new group called the Silviculture Society has been established by the Ethereum Foundation. This group aims to uphold the core values of Ethereum.

news.headline: Rolling back Ethereum transactions post-Bybit hack isn't possible due to network size. The fallout would be massive.
news.summary: Reverting transactions after the Bybit hack on Ethereum is not possible due to the network's extensive complexity. The scale of Ethereum, with over 590 million transactions and growing, makes implementing a rollback unfeasible. The potential consequences of attempting such a reversal would be substantial and could have widespread impacts within the network.

news.headline: Bitdeer announces new US$20,000,000 share repurchase program after utilizing $9.0 million on Feb 27.
news.summary: On February 27, 2025, Bitdeer Technologies Group (Nasdaq: BTDR), a prominent technology company specializing in blockchain and high-performance computing based in Singapore, completed a share repurchase totaling around US$9.0 million. This exhausts their previously authorized US$10,000,000 share repurchase program from September 2024. Following this, the Company's board of directors sanctioned a new share repurchase program, allowing for the repurchase of an additional US$20,000,000 worth of its Class A ordinary shares ("Shares") between February 28, 2025, and February 28, 2026.

news.headline: Alumis to share 52-week Phase 2 ESK-001 data at AAD, with topline Phase 3 data in 1Q 2026. Late-breaker presentation.
news.summary: Alumis will be showcasing groundbreaking 52-week Phase 2 results for ESK-001 in treating psoriasis at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) conference. Additionally, data from the continuing Phase 3 trial will be revealed in the first quarter of 2026. This represents a major advancement in the field of dermatology, with the potential to significantly impact the treatment of psoriasis.

news.headline: HTeaO appoints Jodie Chau as VP of Supply Chain, bringing 20 years of experience in food & beverage industry.
news.summary: HTeaO, a prominent iced tea franchise based in Fort Worth, Texas, has named Jodie Chau as their new Vice President of Supply Chain. Chau boasts more than 20 years of expertise in the food and beverage sector, specializing in operational efficiency, worldwide procurement, supplier partnerships, and cost reduction methods. Prior to her role at HTeaO, she held the position of Senior Director of Global Purchasing at Dickey’s Barbecue Pit. The franchise is known for its rapid growth and widespread presence across the country.

news.headline: NextNav (Nasdaq: NN) to release Q4 2024 financial results on March 12, 2025 after market closes and host conference call at 5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: NextNav, a prominent company in next generation positioning, navigation, timing, and 3D geolocation, shared that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and complete year concluded on December 31, 2024, subsequent to the market closure on March 12, 2025. The company, listed as Nasdaq: NN, will conduct a conference call on the very day at 5:00 PM Eastern Time to delve into the results.

news.headline: Inflation in January slightly eased according to the recent PCE report. Further progress is needed for interest rate cuts.
news.summary: The central bank is looking for additional signs that inflation is decreasing before considering another cut in interest rates.

news.headline: LITGRID AB releases unaudited financial results for 2024. Company code 302564383, based in Vilnius, Lithuania.
news.summary: LITGRID AB, with the company code 302564383 and headquarters at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo str. 8 in Vilnius, Lithuania, has released its financial performance for the full year of 2024.

news.headline: Sarepta Therapeutics opens Route 79 Duchenne Scholarship, offering up to $5,000 to 20 with Duchenne MD & 5 siblings.
news.summary: Sarepta Therapeutics, Inc. revealed the launch of Route 79, The Duchenne Scholarship Program for the upcoming academic year 2025-2026, offering academic scholarships worth up to $5,000 each. The program aims to support 20 individuals affected by Duchenne muscular dystrophy along with 5 siblings of those affected. This initiative comes as part of the company's dedication to precision genetic medicine for rare diseases. Over the past ten years, substantial progress has been made in the treatment of Duchenne.

news.headline: Great Pacific Media's TV show Highway Thru Hell will air its 200th episode on USA Network, a rare accomplishment.
news.summary: Great Pacific Media, a part of Thunderbird Entertainment Group, is excited to announce that the popular Canadian docuseries Highway Thru Hell will reach a milestone with its 200th episode airing on USA Network at 9 p.m. ET on March 4th. Surpassing 100 episodes is impressive for a television series, but surpassing 200 episodes is even rarer. This marks a significant achievement for Highway Thru Hell as it continues to captivate audiences.

news.headline: American Vanguard will release Q4 2024 results on March 14, 2025, with a conference call at 9am ET/6am PT. Website will host webcast.
news.summary: American Vanguard® Company (NYSE: AVD) disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for Q4 of 2024 on March 14, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call concentrating on operational performance and financial results is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET / 6:00 a.m. PT on the same day. The call will be accessible through a live webcast on the Company’s website at www.american-van.

news.headline: North Sea Bfoet crude loadings set at 560k b/d in April.
Steakholder Foods secures $1.25M fund from Alumni Capital LP and $8M equity line of credit, issuing 985,028 ADSs at $1.269 each.
news.summary: Steakholder Foods Ltd., a prominent player in alternative protein and 3D printing technologies based in Rehovot, Israel, disclosed today that it has finalized agreements for a private placement with technology investor Alumni Capital LP. The agreement involves the sale of 985,028 of the company's American Depositary Shares (ADSs) or pre-funded warrants at a rate of $1.269 per ADS. Additionally, warrants granting the option to purchase up to 985,028 ADSs will be provided. These warrants are set at an exercise price of $2.00 per ADS, with immediate exercisability upon issuance and a five-year validity period from the date of issuance.

news.headline: Study shows 5G operations in lower 900 MHz band can coexist with unlicensed tech, strengthening GPS. Win-win solution.
news.summary: Extensive technical analysis has shown that NextNav's proposal for a 5G-powered Positioning, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) system supports coexistence with unlicensed devices. This advancement also enhances critical terrestrial backup and complements GPS. The analysis, involving thorough examination and evaluation, confirms the effectiveness of NextNav's solution in accommodating multiple devices simultaneously. This proposal significantly contributes to the evolution of technology, as it offers a dependable alternative in crucial scenarios. These findings indicate that NextNav's 5G-PNT proposal could play a vital role in the future, amid increasing demands for reliable and efficient positioning systems.

news.headline: Industry veteran and Chairman of TEN Ltd., Mr. John Stavropoulos, passed at 92 in Athens. CEO announced the news.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025 in Athens, Greece, TEN Ltd. shared the news of the passing of their former Chairman, Mr. D. John Stavropoulos, aged 92. Mr. Stavropoulos, a noted banker, had served as the Chairman of Tsakos Energy Navigation for a significant period. TEN Ltd., a prominent operator of crude, product, and LNG tankers, made this announcement. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol "TEN".

news.headline: InflaRx to present vilobelimab's role in immuno-dermatology at 2025 AAD Annual Meeting in Orlando, FL, March 7 - 11.
news.summary: In JENA, Germany, on February 28, 2025, InflaRx N.V. (Nasdaq: IFRX), a pioneering biopharmaceutical company focusing on anti-inflammatory therapeutics against the complement system, shared that all abstracts submitted have been approved. These abstracts will spotlight the impact of vilobelimab on treating pyoderma gangrenosum (PG) and hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). The findings are scheduled to be presented at the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting set to take place from March 7 to 11 in Orlando, FL.

news.headline: Blaqclouds reveals significant achievements in March 2025.
Acme United's net sales rose by 10% in Q4 2024; adjusted net income increased by 9% in Q4 and 23% for the year.
news.summary: Adjusted net income saw a 9% rise in the fourth quarter and a substantial 23% gain for the entire year. The increase in net income for the year was more than double the growth seen in the fourth quarter.

news.headline: WORK Medical Technology Group LTD partners with Shanghai Chartwell Medical Device Co. to enhance growth in healthcare sector.
news.summary: Hangzhou, China, Feb. 28, 2025 - A notable medical technology company, WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK), has unveiled a strategic collaboration with Shanghai Chartwell Medical Device Co., Ltd. The partnership aims to bolster industrial synergy and expedite growth within the healthcare domain. WORK Medical, known for supplying medical devices, made the announcement regarding their subsidiary, Work (Hangzhou) Medical Treatment Equipment Co., Ltd., and its Chinese branches. Chartwell Medical, a renowned manufacturer in various medical fields like nuclear medicine, imaging, infection control, ophthalmology, and rehabilitation robotics, is set to join forces with WORK Medical. By coming together, the companies aspire to leverage their expertise and resources for mutual advancement.

news.headline: 7 Brew launches Flavor Madness Sweepstakes, offering customers chance to win by scanning QR code from March 1-31, 2025.
news.summary: In Fayetteville, Arkansas, the drive-thru beverage concept 7 Brew is innovating the industry with its fast service, top-notch drinks, and lively hospitality. They have just revealed their Flavor Madness Sweepstakes, a lively promotion running from March 1, 2025, to March 31, 2025. During this month-long event coinciding with the college basketball season peak, 7 Brew patrons can participate by scanning a QR code at the drive-thru. This initiative aims to offer excitement and entertainment to their loyal customers.

news.headline: TaskUs (Nasdaq: TASK) CEO to present at 2025 Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 4, 2025 in San Francisco.
news.summary: TaskUs, Inc., a prominent provider of outsourced digital services and next-generation customer experience, revealed that Bryce Maddock, Co-Founder and CEO, will take part in the 2025 Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, March 4, 2025, at The Palace Hotel in San Francisco, CA. Maddock will engage in a fireside chat starting at 2:35 PM PST during the conference. TaskUs is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TASK.

news.headline: NYSE lifts trading suspension on Know Labs, stock now trading above low price threshold, saving delisting.
news.summary: In Seattle today, Know Labs, Inc., a prominent developer in Radio Frequency Dielectric Spectroscopy (RFDS) sensor technology, revealed that NYSE Regulation has rescinded its decision to delist the company and will lift the suspension on trading the Company's common stock on the NYSE American. This decision comes as the NYSE Regulation staff observed that the Company's common stock has rebounded above the required low selling price threshold outlined in Section 1003. This allows the Company's common stock to resume trading without any restrictions on the NYSE American.

news.headline: ISG appoints Samuel L. Molinaro Jr., a senior financial exec, to its board of directors. $III
news.summary: Samuel L. Molinaro Jr., a seasoned financial services executive, has been appointed to the board of directors at Information Services Group (ISG). This appointment by ISG (Nasdaq: III) follows their decision to add Molinaro to their team. Located in Stamford, Conn., the company made this announcement as a strategic move to enhance their board.

news.headline: Masimo to present at Raymond James Conference on March 4, 2025 at 11:35am Eastern time. Live webcast available.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Masimo disclosed that its executives will join the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investor Conference on March 4, 2025, at 11:35 a.m. Eastern Time. A live stream of the event can be accessed on Masimo's website. The replay will also be available post-event. Masimo, a worldwide medical technology firm (NASDAQ: MASI), specializes in developing innovative healthcare solutions.

news.headline: athenahealth showcases AI investments and market solutions at HIMSS 2025, with booth 3432 featuring their advancements.
news.summary: A prominent healthcare technology company, athenahealth, will be showcasing their innovative solutions at the upcoming HIMSS event from March 3-6. With a focus on simplifying healthcare practices, athenahealth will highlight their open ecosystem approach and significant technological investments. The company will be stationed at booth 3432 during the expo, offering insights on industry trends and integrated partnership models. Visitors can engage with representatives from various departments to learn more about athenahealth's contributions to the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Belden Inc's Precision Optical Technologies recognized for OpenPath® PON Extender by 2025 Lightwave+BTR Innovation Reviews.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC), a top global provider of comprehensive connection solutions, disclosed that its Precision Optical Technologies brand, part of Belden’s broadband solutions lineup, has achieved impressive recognition for its OpenPath® PON Extender technology. The innovative technology specifically designed for fiber-to-the-home purposes received outstanding honoree status following evaluation by a group of optical communications and broadband specialists.

news.headline: Inflation slightly eased in Jan, with Fed's preferred gauge showing progress. Further decline needed before possible rate cut.
news.summary: The central bank is waiting for more evidence that inflation is decreasing before considering another interest rate cut.

news.headline: Global head-mounted display market to reach $26 billion by 2030, growing at CAGR of 39.2%. Meta, Sony, PICO Immersive among dominating companies.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Head Mounted Display Market has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for head-mounted displays was valued at US$3.3 billion in 2023 and is expected to exhibit a significant compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 39.2% over the forecast period, reaching a market size of US$26.0 billion by 2030. The growth of the Head-Mounted Display (HMD) market is being fueled by technological advancements, particularly in the field of virtual reality (VR).

news.headline: C3 AI CEO to speak at The Citizens JMP Technology Conference on March 3 at 3:00 pm ET. Watch the webcast replay on C3 AI's IR website.
news.summary: A company named C3 AI, traded on NYSE under the symbol AI, based in Redwood City, California, provides Enterprise AI application software. The Chairman and CEO, Thomas M. Siebel, is set to engage in a fireside chat at The Citizens JMP Technology Conference on March 3 at 3:00 pm ET. The event will be accessible for replay on C3 AI's Investor Relations website (ir.c3.ai). C3 AI focuses on Enterprise AI applications.

news.headline: Financial protection uncertain as CFPB halts; Rules on fees, debt & apps on hold. Check statements regularly.
news.summary: Regulations regarding bank and credit card fees, medical debt, and payment apps are currently uncertain. One expert advises individuals to diligently review their financial statements to stay informed.

news.headline: SkyDrive partners with AeroGulf, receiving pre-order for 50 eVTOL aircraft to target air mobility opportunities in Dubai.
news.summary: SkyDrive Inc., a prominent Japanese eVTOL aircraft manufacturer, has signed a Letter of Intent with AeroGulf Services Company LLC, a Dubai-based helicopter charter company, for the potential purchase of up to 50 "SKYDRIVE" eVTOL aircraft. The partnership aims to investigate innovative air mobility prospects at Palm Jumeirah in Dubai. SkyDrive, known for its cutting-edge aircraft technology, is set to collaborate with AeroGulf Services to tap into the lucrative market opportunities in the iconic tourist spot.

news.headline: ventureLAB's Hardware Catalyst Initiative hits 5 years, with $5 million investment leading to growth in Canada's HardTech sector.
news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, ventureLAB is marking a milestone with the Hardware Catalyst Initiative, the first and only hardware and semiconductor startup incubator in Canada, which has been running for five years. Established in 2019 with an exceptional $5 million funding from FedDev Ontario, this initiative has revolutionized the Canadian HardTech industry. It has enhanced supply chains, encouraged innovative developments, and boosted startups in various sectors including MedTech, AI, automotive technology, and more.

news.headline: Semtech to discuss key topics in fireside chat at con, incl recent industry trends & financial performance, anticipate 500 participants.
news.summary: Recently, a new report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The report indicated that there were 200,000 new jobs created in the last quarter, contributing to this decrease in unemployment. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy grew by 3.2% in the same period, exceeding expectations. This positive trend is seen as a result of various government initiatives aimed at boosting job creation and economic growth. Experts believe that if this momentum continues, the country is on track to further reduce unemployment and sustain economic progress in the coming years.

news.headline: Financial 15 Split Corp. extends termination date from Dec 1, 2025 to Dec 1, 2030 - 5-year extension.
news.summary: Toronto, February 28, 2025: Financial 15 Split Corp. has recently revealed its decision to prolong the termination date of the company by an additional five years. The extension moves the initial deadline of December 1, 2025, to December 1, 2030.

news.headline: California Water Service Group appoints Kris A. Hamner as Chief HR Officer, succeeding Ronald D. Webb after a decade.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in SAN JOSE, California, the California Water Service Group revealed that Kris A. Hamner will become the new Vice President and Chief Human Resource Officer of the Company. This transition on the NYSE-listed Company (NYSE: CWT) signifies the retirement of Ronald D. Webb after over a decade of dedicated service. Kris A. Hamner's appointment is effective immediately and marks a significant change in the company's leadership structure.

news.headline: Arcutis to present 2 posters at 2025 AAD annual meeting in Orlando, FL from March 7-11.
news.summary: Today, Arcutis revealed plans to showcase two posters at the 2025 AAD annual conference in Orlando, FL. The event is scheduled to run from March 7 to March 11, 2025.

news.headline: Callan JMB offers new lease program for vaccine management for govt and private orgs, easing economic burden.
news.summary: In Spring Branch, Texas, on February 28, 2025, Callan JMB INC. (NASDAQ: CJMB) unveiled a new initiative aimed at facilitating vaccine management for healthcare and emergency management sectors. The program offers a comprehensive lease model allowing government entities and private firms to access vital immunization services without the financial strain of upfront equipment purchases. Callan JMB specializes in integrative logistics solutions, providing storage, monitoring, and cold chain logistics. This program is designed to enhance efficiency and accessibility, ensuring crucial vaccines reach the intended recipients effectively.

news.headline: Stifel donates to Mikaela Shiffrin's "MIK100" initiative after her historic 100th win, aiming to raise $100,000 for charity.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Stifel (NYSE: SF), the official team naming partner of the Stifel U.S. Alpine Ski Team, commemorated Mikaela Shiffrin's monumental achievement of securing her 100th career World Cup triumph. The accomplished skier clinched the top spot in the slalom event held in Sestriere, Italy. Stifel contributed to this success by aiding Shiffrin in raising an impressive $100,000 for the Share Winter Foundation.

news.headline: DFDS awards long-term incentives to tie management pay to company's performance, aiming to retain management.
news.summary: DFDS has introduced a new long-term incentive plan for its management team to align their compensation with the company's ongoing performance, as indicated by the share price. This initiative also serves to encourage the retention of key management personnel within the organization.

news.headline: AB KN Energies held a webinar on 28th Feb 2025 discussing financial results for twelve months of 2024.
news.summary: AB KN Energies (KN) conducted an investor conference webinar on February 28, 2025, during which KN's Chief Financial Officer Tomas Tumėnas discussed the financial performance of KN Group for the full year of 2024.

news.headline: Novartis to present data from 17 abstracts at AAAAI and AAD, showcasing advancements in treating HS and CSU.
news.summary: Novartis revealed today its plan to showcase findings from 17 abstracts, incorporating investigator-initiated trials, covering various aspects of its immunology portfolio at the upcoming 2025 American Academy of Allergy Asthma and Immunology (AAAAI) and World Allergy Organization (WAO) Joint Congress, along with the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting.
